subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! That which thou hadst written was read with the utmost care, despite the lack of time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی بدقت تمام با وجود عدم فرصت قرائت گردید
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action, @wisdom [hikmat], @love and unity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
